assertion_results.text: The verification report marks at least 2 acceptance criteria as FAIL, identifying specific gaps between the diff and the task requirements
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 20: 'Acceptance Criteria | FAIL | 3 of 6 criteria met; 3 criteria FAIL (invalid threshold not rejected with 400, missing threshold_applied field, plus a logic bug in threshold comparison)'. Criterion 3 is FAIL (invalid threshold returns 400), Criterion 5 is FAIL (threshold_applied boolean field missing). Additionally Criterion 1 is noted as having a logic bug. At least 2 acceptance criteria are marked FAIL with specific gap descriptions.

assertion_results.text: The report identifies that invalid threshold values are silently accepted (unwrap_or(0)) instead of returning 400 Bad Request as required
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 32: 'Invalid threshold silently accepted (Criterion 3 -- FAIL): The code uses .unwrap_or(0) when the threshold string is not found in the severity order array. This means ?threshold=invalid silently defaults to index 0 (treating it as threshold=critical) instead of returning 400 Bad Request.' criterion-3.md further elaborates: '.unwrap_or(0) converts the None to index 0. The endpoint proceeds as if threshold=critical was specified and returns a 200 OK response with filtered data.'

assertion_results.text: The report identifies that the threshold_applied boolean field is missing from the response
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 33: 'Missing threshold_applied field (Criterion 5 -- FAIL): The AdvisorySummary response struct does not include a threshold_applied boolean field. The model file (modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs) was not modified at all.' criterion-5.md confirms: 'The response does NOT include a threshold_applied boolean field... There is no threshold_applied field anywhere in the diff.'

assertion_results.text: The report identifies that the test file tests/api/advisory_summary.rs is absent from the diff — no tests were created
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 9: 'tests/api/advisory_summary.rs | MISSING | Expected in Files to Create -- NOT present in diff'. Line 29: 'Missing test file: tests/api/advisory_summary.rs was listed in Files to Create but is entirely absent from the diff. None of the six test requirements are satisfied.' Scope Containment section (line 52): 'tests/api/advisory_summary.rs -- listed in Files to Create but ABSENT from the diff.'

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: The outputs directory contains only report.md and criterion-1.md through criterion-6.md. No code files (.rs, .toml, etc.) were created or modified. All output files are verification reports and criterion analysis documents. The eval-2 directory contains only an outputs/ subdirectory and timing.json.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR — it presents findings for human review (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md concludes with 'The PR requires fixes before merge: add 400 validation for invalid threshold values using AppError::BadRequest, add threshold_applied boolean field to AdvisorySummary, fix the threshold comparison logic inversion, correct the total computation to use filtered counts, and create the required test file.' The overall result is FAIL. There is no mention of auto-merging, no merge commands executed. The report presents findings for human review.

assertion_results.text: The overall result is FAIL, not PASS or WARN
The report contains a Test Change Classification row with N/A — no test files exist in the PR diff
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 22: '| Test Change Classification | N/A | No test files exist in the PR diff |'. Also line 104: 'Test Change Classification -- N/A. No test files exist in the PR diff.'

assertion_results.text: The report includes detailed findings for each failing check with specific evidence from the diff — Scope Containment identifies the missing test file by comparing PR files against the task specification, Acceptance Criteria provides per-criterion analysis explaining each gap
assertion_results.evidence: Scope Containment (lines 46-53): Lists PR files ('modules/fundamental/src/advisory/endpoints/get.rs (Modified) -- listed in Files to Modify', 'modules/fundamental/src/advisory/service/advisory.rs (Modified) -- listed in Files to Modify') and identifies unimplemented file ('tests/api/advisory_summary.rs -- listed in Files to Create but ABSENT from the diff'). Acceptance Criteria (lines 78-92): provides per-criterion numbered analysis with verdicts. Criterion 3 FAIL explains '.unwrap_or(0)' and suggests '.ok_or(AppError::BadRequest(...))'. Criterion 5 FAIL identifies 'No threshold_applied field exists in the AdvisorySummary struct or in the response construction. The model file was not modified.'

assertion_results.text: Acceptance criteria verification produces per-criterion PASS/FAIL analysis with code-level evidence — each criterion-N.md output file contains detailed reasoning about what was checked and what gap was found
assertion_results.evidence: Six criterion files exist (criterion-1.md through criterion-6.md). Each contains a Criterion number, Text, Verdict (PASS/FAIL), and detailed Reasoning section with code snippets. criterion-1.md: PASS with caveats, includes code showing severity_order array and index comparison logic bug. criterion-2.md: PASS, shows SummaryParams struct and None branch code. criterion-3.md: FAIL, shows unwrap_or(0) code and explains silent acceptance. criterion-4.md: PASS, shows severity_order definition. criterion-5.md: FAIL, shows AdvisorySummary struct construction lacking threshold_applied field. criterion-6.md: PASS, shows SbomService::new fetch code and explains 404 preservation.

assertion_results.text: Eval Quality is N/A because no eval result reviews exist in the PR — the 3-criteria detection (author github-actions[bot], marker ## Eval Results, footer sdlc-workflow/run-evals) found no matches, so Eval Quality does not affect the Test Quality combination
assertion_results.evidence: The report.md does not contain an 'Eval Quality' row or section anywhere. The Test Quality row (line 21) shows 'N/A | No test files exist in the PR diff' but does not mention Eval Quality. There is no mention of the 3-criteria detection mechanism (author github-actions[bot], marker ## Eval Results, footer sdlc-workflow/run-evals) anywhere in report.md or any criterion file. The assertion requires a specific Eval Quality entry with N/A and details about the detection criteria, which is absent from the outputs.
